channel.title: Posts on Ben Potter
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ben Potter

item.title: Linked List Deletion
item.description: What is a linked list? A linked list is similar to an array but stores information a bit differently in memory. A linked list is a collection of nodes that contain two things: 1 2 3 4 struct node { int data; struct node* next; } The next attribute is a pointer that refers to the next node in the list. This way we can traverse a linked list by using the next element of each node.
